book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice.
The Canons of the CCXVII Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage. Commonly Called The Code of Canons of the African Church.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice

title: Canon LXXX.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: That it is not permitted to make superiors of monasteries nor to ordain as clerics those who are received from a monastery not one’s own.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Item, it seemed good that if any bishop wished to advance to the clericature a monk received from a monastery not under his jurisdiction, or shall have appointed him superior of a monastery of his own, the bishop who shall have thus acted shall be separated from the communion of others and shall rest content with the communion of his own people alone, but the monk shall continue neither as cleric nor superior.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Whoever shall receive a monk from a monastery not subject to his jurisdiction, and if he shall ordain him to the clerical estate or shall appoint him prior of his monastery, such an one shall be cut off from communion.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: This is Canon xiv. of Carthage, September, a.d.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
